'''Tiki-hava''' was the [[Star/Legends|sun]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Arzid]]. It was characterized by gigantic [[Color/Legends|green]] fire-storms that leapt from its surface, casting an eerie glow for thousands of [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]].<ref name="POTDS" />

{{Star-stub}}

*[[Prophets of the Dark Side (novel)|''Prophets of the Dark Side'']]
